name: plasma
title: Plasma
description: Flowing colored plasma blobs inside text via bg-clip + multi radial-gradient.

.trickle-plasma.background-image: radial-gradient(circle at 20% 50%, oklch(72% 0.22 30) 0%, transparent 40%), radial-gradient(circle at 80% 50%, oklch(72% 0.2 130) 0%, transparent 40%), radial-gradient(circle at 50% 80%, oklch(72% 0.22 290) 0%, transparent 40%), radial-gradient(circle at 50% 20%, oklch(72% 0.18 200) 0%, transparent 40%)
